title: Provider Claim Anomaly Event
description: Emitted by a provider-{id} Integration Service API Workflow when claim telemetry drops past the anomaly threshold. Triggers the Claim Flow Anomaly Detector in the Multi-Customer Investigation stage.

source_system.description: The Integration Service API Workflow that emits this event.

provider_id.description: Which provider is reporting the anomaly. Must match a vocabulary.stakeholders.providers id.

claim_drop_pct.description: Percentage drop in claim volume relative to 30-day baseline.

anomaly_score.description: Pre-computed anomaly score from ClaimTelemetry Data Fabric entity. 0.0 = normal, 1.0 = certain anomaly.

business_continuity_runway_days.description: How many days the provider can sustain claim flow disruption before liquidity crisis.

maestro_trigger_filter_hint.description: Paste this as the Maestro Trigger FilterTree JSON when wiring this event type to a trigger in Slice 010/012. The trigger should route to Claim Flow Anomaly Detection task (tTNOuRcy1) in Multi-Customer Investigation stage (Stage_jsrEfr).
